scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:citizen && npm run install:provider && npm run install:admin && npm run install:shared
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:citizen" "npm run dev:provider" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:citizen && npm run build:provider && npm run build:admin
scripts.build:citizen: cd citizen-app && npx expo build:android && npx expo build:ios
scripts.build:provider: cd provider-app && npx expo build:android && npx expo build:ios
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:citizen && npm run test:provider && npm run test:admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:citizen && npm run lint:provider && npm run lint:admin
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.clean: npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:citizen && npm run clean:provider && npm run clean:admin
